content.full_text:
September 22, 2005

Frank J. Fekete
Special Counsel
Kern County Superintendent of Schools
1300 17th Street – City Centre
Bakersfield, CA 93301-4533

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-05-186

Dear Mr. Fekete:

This letter confirms receipt of your August 29, 2005, request for advice regarding the gift provisions of the Political Reform Act. Under the provisions of California Code of Regulations 18329(b)(8)(B), unless you are an authorized representative of the chief executive officer for which you seek assistance, the Fair Political Practices Commission cannot address your questions or provide analysis. During a phone conversation with me, you indicated that you were not an authorized representative of this officer. I enclose a copy of regulation 18329 for your review.

If you have any questions, feel free to call me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Trish Mayer
Political Reform Consultant

Enclosure
